reason: Confirms lib/theme/ as the home for app-wide tokens (where AppMotion belongs, mirroring AppDimens); confirms views/ layout for the touched files.
Establishes the centralized-theme + AppDimens token convention that AppMotion must mirror exactly; also documents EmptyState/SegmentedButton patterns we should not regress.
Lint + analyze conventions; importantly, the note that flutter analyze crashes on CJK repo paths so we cannot rely on it for verification.
repo_shell.dart manages tab state; the AnimatedSwitcher key + direction tracking must respect existing state-management patterns (Riverpod/notifier) without leaking AnimationController lifecycles.
Pre-modification rule: before adding AppMotion, grep for existing Duration/Curve usage; when swapping literals in touched files, sweep them all (search-first habit).
